_docs.enabled: Default: true. Values: true|false. Master switch for all auto-mine behavior.
_docs.requirePickaxe: Default: true. Values: true|false. If true, only pickaxes can trigger auto-mine.
_docs.requireSneakForAutoMine: Default: true. Values: true|false. If true, the player must hold Shift while mining.
_docs.showGateFeedback: Default: true. Values: true|false. Shows rate-limited action-bar gate hints and visible auto-mine status messages.
_docs.enableTimePenalty: Default: true. Values: true|false. If true, auto-mine applies per-block delay; false uses zero-delay batches capped by maxInstantBlocksPerTick.
_docs.enableHungerTax: Default: true. Values: true|false. If true, automated mining consumes exhaustion per block.
_docs.matchDeepslateVariants: Default: true. Values: true|false. If true, stone and deepslate variants of one ore family connect; false matches only the trigger block type.
_docs.durabilityProtectionMode: Default: all. Values: off|all|enchanted_only. Controls when the durability floor is enforced.
_docs.durabilityMultiplier: Default: 3. Range: 1..10. Pickaxe durability cost multiplier for automated ore blocks.
_docs.blockBreakDelayTicksByEfficiencyLevel: Map keys: 0..5 for unenchanted through Efficiency V. Default ticks: 0=16, 1=8, 2=4, 3=2, 4=1, 5=0. Values are clamped to 0..40; missing levels restore defaults and unknown keys are removed.
_docs.maxInstantBlocksPerTick: Default: 8. Range: 1..64. Per-player block cap for delay-zero auto-mine.
_docs.exhaustionPerBlock: Default: 0.4. Range: 0.0..4.0. Exhaustion applied per automated ore block.
_docs.xpCostPerBlock: Default: 1. Range: 0..100. XP points charged per automated ore block when XP tax applies.
_docs.enableDurabilityXpSubstitution: Default: false. Values: true|false. Substitutes extra automation durability per successful ore break; vanilla base durability remains.
_docs.durabilityXpSubstitutionWindow: Default: 10. Range: 0..1000. Only durability within this many points above the floor may be substituted.
_docs.xpPerSubstitutedDurabilityPoint: Default: 3. Range: 0..100. XP charged after a successful break per substituted extra durability point.
_docs.durabilityProtectionFloor: Default: 1. Range: 0..10000. Auto-mine will not intentionally consume durability below this remaining amount.
_docs.hungerTaxFloor: Default: 1. Range: 0..20. Hunger tax preserves this food-level floor; 0 disables the floor.
_docs.xpTaxFloor: Default: 0. Range: 0..100000. XP tax will not consume below this total-XP floor.
_docs.hungerResumeTimeoutTicks: Default: 400. Range: 20..7200. Paused work resumes if hunger returns before this timeout.
_docs.maxVeinBlocks: Default: 64. Range: 16..2048. Hard cap for connected ore-vein scan size.
_docs.maxHorizontalVeinRadius: Default: 8. Range: 4..64. Maximum horizontal radius from the trigger block.
_docs.maxMineDistance: Default: 64. Range: 8..128. Cancels queued auto-mine when a target is farther than this distance.
_docs.minimumTierByOreFamily: Map keys: all documented ore-family names. Values: wood|stone|copper|iron|diamond|netherite. Invalid values reset to each family's default.
